name: Conch Fritters Scungilli
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the scungilli in a food processor.
2. Grate the onion and pepper into the scungilli mixture.
3. Add eggs, salt, and melted butter to the mixture. Mix well.
4. Sift flour and baking powder into the mixture and blend until it is thick enough to spoon into hot oil.
5. Fry the fritters in batches until golden brown on all sides.
6. Serve with your choice of seafood sauce. Makes 14 to 18 fritters.
